title: Wararmbise
description: Equip yourself for the frontlines with specialized field medic uniforms and tactical camouflage gear designed for both stealth and survival.
body:
Overview
Step into specialized roles with this tactical gear expansion. Whether you prefer the invisible approach of a long-range marksman or the life-saving duty of a frontline medic, this mod provides the essential tools for survival and deep customization.
Key Features
Adaptive Ghillie Suit: Master the art of stealth. The suit features dynamic camouflage patterns that automatically change based on your current biome, making you nearly invisible in any environment.
SWAT Tactical Unit: Suit up for high-intensity breaches. Equipping a full SWAT armor set activates a specialized Set Bonus, automatically supplying you with Flashbang Grenades.
Flash Grenade & Crafting: Blind your enemies and take control. Craft them using 1 Stone, 1 Gunpowder, and 1 Iron Ingot. We’ve also added Civilian Armor and a Safe (currently decorative) to the crafting list.
Field Medic Uniform: Become the ultimate support. Wearing the full doctor’s attire grants a specialized logistical advantage, periodically supplying you with life-saving equipment.
Tactical First Aid Kit: A powerful medical tool with a 3-second cast time. It completely restores all health points but requires tactical timing due to a 30-second cooldown.
Customization & Patches: Express yourself with the Patch System. Equip one of 10 different variants on your right arm via a dedicated Custom GUI (Default key: [F9]) using the Curios API slot.
Technical Integration: Includes 2 new advancements to track your progress and full Curios API support for the new armor slots.
Hide in plain sight. Save your squad. Control the field.
